codeReview.summary: Reviewed the CLI JSON artifact expansion, the resolved-config source-attribution fix, and the new CLI/router/reviewer coverage for override reruns. The implementation matches the feature contract: bench overrides change the selected team for the same resolved refs, execution-setting overrides preserve planner selection while changing the observed execution settings, and fixed-model reviewers no longer inherit unrelated pool-override source labels.

summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, shared-state files, and commit 1dfc4812531c1b0e77547233396c6979376b8f35. I found no high-confidence correctness, security, maintainability, or contract-compliance issues in this first-run feature review.
